headline: SSR Mining Optimizes Portfolio With Copler Mine Stake Sale
summary: SSRM closes the sale of its 80% stake in the Copler Mine for $1.49 billion, advancing its strategic shift toward an Americas-focused platform.

raw.headline: SSR Mining Optimizes Portfolio With Copler Mine Stake Sale
raw.summary: SSRM closes the sale of its 80% stake in the Copler Mine for $1.49 billion, advancing its strategic shift toward an Americas-focused platform.

headline: Avient Launches PREPERM Low Loss Dielectric Thermoplastics Globally
summary: AVNT's PREPERM Low Loss Dielectric Thermoplastics targets 5G/6G radar growth, helping address signal loss, warpage and BSIS barriers.
